name: Anupaul Saikia
my_twin: In raw mentality: My own twin, even if he is digital or robotic, is the accomplised version of myself, whom I'm not only chasing to catch, but to overtake. I live a life where everyday is exactly the same. I want to go out in the world, I want to visit places, but I am unable to think of a clear plan because of my indecisive nature, that's where my twin jumps in, choose couple of places where I want to go and it decides how much money i need to spend the least to get there. it would decide an economical plan of places to visit with less spending, it works purely on search algorithms (Djikstra Algorithm is the most preferred trend). Things like those are the most commendable ways of utiilizing AI, making your life easier as it purely and reliably analyzes from data, statistics and probability
